metadata.name: Azure internal web app baseline
metadata.description: Orchestrates the repo-only Azure IaC artifacts for the approved West Europe internal web app shape.
Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the protected frontend and backend applications.
Client ID for the frontend Microsoft Entra application registration.
Client ID for the backend Microsoft Entra application registration.
Azure region for all regional resources.
Short workload prefix used in resource names.
Environment label used in resource names and tags.
Short suffix used to keep globally unique names reviewable and deterministic.
Address space for the shared virtual network.
Address prefix for the App Service integration subnet.
Address prefix for the private endpoints subnet.
SQL administrator login used for the initial logical server configuration.
SQL administrator password used for the initial logical server configuration.
When true, the Key Vault module adds a private endpoint. Public network access remains disabled in the approved baseline.
Retention period, in days, for Log Analytics data.
Monthly subscription budget ceiling in the local billing currency.
Email recipients for budget notifications when a reviewer wants explicit contacts instead of role-based alerts.
Tags applied to all supported resources created by this template.

properties.notes: Applied by the repo-only governance baseline after reviewer approval.

metadata.name: Monitoring module
metadata.description: Deploys the Log Analytics workspace used by diagnostics across the repo-only Azure baseline.
Retention period, in days, for Log Analytics data.
Azure region for the monitoring resources.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Tags applied to the monitoring resources.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.
Customer ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

metadata.name: Networking module
metadata.description: Deploys the shared VNet, subnets, NSG, private DNS zones, and VNet links for the approved baseline.
Address prefix for the App Service integration subnet.
Azure region for the networking resources.
Private DNS zone names keyed by service.
Address prefix for the private endpoints subnet.
Tags applied to the networking resources.
Address space for the shared virtual network.
Name of the shared virtual network.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by diagnostic settings.
Resource ID of the VNet.
Resource ID of the App Service integration subnet.
Resource ID of the private endpoints subnet.
Resource ID of the SQL private DNS zone.
Resource ID of the Storage private DNS zone.
Resource ID of the Key Vault private DNS zone.

metadata.name: App Service module
metadata.description: Deploys the shared B1 App Service plan and the frontend and backend web apps with managed identity and Entra auth.
Name of the backend App Service web app.
Client ID for the backend Microsoft Entra application registration.
Name of the frontend App Service web app.
Client ID for the frontend Microsoft Entra application registration.
URI of the Key Vault used by the applications.
Azure region for the App Service resources.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by diagnostic settings.
Name of the shared App Service plan.
Resource ID of the App Service integration subnet.
Tags applied to the App Service resources.
Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the protected applications.
Resource ID of the App Service plan.
Resource ID of the frontend web app.
Resource ID of the backend web app.
System-assigned managed identity principal ID for the frontend web app.
System-assigned managed identity principal ID for the backend web app.

metadata.name: SQL module
metadata.description: Deploys the Azure SQL logical server, Basic database, private endpoint, and diagnostics for the approved baseline.
Name of the SQL database.
Azure region for the SQL resources.
Resource ID of the SQL private DNS zone.
Resource ID of the private endpoints subnet.
SQL administrator login used for the logical server.
SQL administrator password used for the logical server.
Name of the SQL logical server.
Tags applied to the SQL resources.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by diagnostic settings.
Resource ID of the SQL logical server.
Resource ID of the SQL database.

metadata.name: Storage module
metadata.description: Deploys the private-only storage account, blob private endpoint, and diagnostics for the approved baseline.
Azure region for the storage resources.
Resource ID of the Storage private DNS zone.
Resource ID of the private endpoints subnet.
Name of the storage account.
Tags applied to the storage resources.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by diagnostic settings.
Resource ID of the storage account.
Primary blob endpoint of the storage account.

metadata.name: Key Vault module
metadata.description: Deploys the Key Vault, optional private endpoint, and diagnostics for the approved baseline.
Name of the Key Vault.
Azure region for the Key Vault resources.
Resource ID of the Key Vault private DNS zone.
Resource ID of the private endpoints subnet.
When true, deploy a private endpoint for the Key Vault. Public network access remains disabled in all cases.
Tags applied to the Key Vault resources.
Microsoft Entra tenant ID for the Key Vault.
Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by diagnostic settings.
Resource ID of the Key Vault.
URI of the Key Vault for application configuration.

metadata.name: Governance module
metadata.description: Deploys the subscription budget definitions for the approved baseline.
Optional email recipients for budget notifications.
Name of the subscription budget resource.
Monthly subscription budget ceiling in the local billing currency.
Tags retained for reviewer context in module outputs.
Budget resource ID for reviewer reference.
Tag values passed into the governance module for review context.
Review-focused naming summary for the approved deployment shape.
Key resource IDs emitted for review and later deployment wiring.
Review notes for policy-sensitive or out-of-scope configuration items.

value.budgetScope: Subscription budget and resource-group lock are modeled only as template resources. Reviewers must decide when to deploy them.
